Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class ProductionProfile.Point

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.ProductionProfile.Point
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ProductionProfile
public static class ProductionProfile.Point extends Object implements Serializable
A single point on a production profile.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Constructor Details

    • Point

      public Point(double timeYears, double rateSm3PerDay, double revenuePerDay, double energyKWhPerDay, double emissionsKgPerDay, double reservoirPressureBara)
      Creates a profile point.
      Parameters:
      timeYears - time in years
      rateSm3PerDay - field rate in Sm3/day
      revenuePerDay - revenue in currency per day
      energyKWhPerDay - energy in kWh per day
      emissionsKgPerDay - emissions in kg CO2 per day
      reservoirPressureBara - average reservoir pressure in bara

  • Method Details

    • getTimeYears

      public double getTimeYears()
      Returns the time.
      Returns:
      time in years

      public double getRateSm3PerDay()
      Returns the field rate.
      Returns:
      rate in Sm3/day

      public double getRevenuePerDay()
      Returns the revenue rate.
      Returns:

    • getEnergyKWhPerDay

      public double getEnergyKWhPerDay()
      Returns the energy rate.
      Returns:
      energy in kWh per day

    • getEmissionsKgPerDay

      public double getEmissionsKgPerDay()
      Returns the emission rate.
      Returns:
      emissions in kg CO2 per day

    • getReservoirPressureBara

      public double getReservoirPressureBara()
      Returns the average reservoir pressure.
      Returns:
